# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Create an Istio RequestAuthentication policy for JWT validation. Configure jwks and issuer settings to validate incoming tokens. Set up rules to extract JWT claims from Authorization headers. This is for our API authentication layer.
# Category: istio_jwt_validation_weak

apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: RequestAuthentication
metadata:
  name: jwt-api-authentication
  namespace: default
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: api-gateway
  jwtRules:
  - issuer: "https://auth.example.com"
    jwksUri: "https://auth.example.com/.well-known/jwks.json"
    fromHeaders:
    - name: Authorization
      prefix: "Bearer "
    - name: X-Auth-Token
    fromParams:
    - "auth_token"
    outputPayloadToHeader: "x-jwt-payload"
    forwardOriginalToken: true
  - issuer: "https://secondary-auth.example.com"
    jwksUri: "https://secondary-auth.example.com/.well-known/jwks.json"
    fromHeaders:
    - name: Authorization
      prefix: "Bearer "
    audiences:
    - "api.example.com"
    - "service.example.com"
---
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: require-jwt
  namespace: default
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: api-gateway
  action: ALLOW
  rules:
  - from:
    - source:
        requestPrincipals: ["https://auth.example.com/*"]
    to:
    - operation:
        methods: ["GET", "POST", "PUT", "DELETE"]
        paths: ["/api/*"]
  - from:
    - source:
        requestPrincipals: ["https://secondary-auth.example.com/*"]
    to:
    - operation:
        methods: ["GET", "POST"]
        paths: ["/api/v2/*"]
    when:
    - key: request.auth.claims[role]
      values: ["admin", "user"]
---
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: RequestAuthentication
metadata:
  name: jwt-internal-services
  namespace: default
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      tier: backend
  jwtRules:
  - issuer: "https://auth.example.com"
    jwksUri: "https://auth.example.com/.well-known/jwks.json"
    fromHeaders:
    - name: Authorization
      prefix: "Bearer "
    outputClaimToHeaders:
    - header: "x-jwt-user-id"
      claim: "sub"
    - header: "x-jwt-user-email"
      claim: "email"
    - header: "x-jwt-user-role"
      claim: "role"
    - header: "x-jwt-tenant-id"
      claim: "tenant_id"
    audiences:
    - "api.example.com"
    forwardOriginalToken: true
